abbreviations.definition: repeat the sequence of loops in brackets L times

rounds.title: Row 1
rounds.rawInstruction: Start 10 sc in a magic ring
rounds.summary: Begin with 10 single crochets in a magic ring.

rounds.title: Rows 2-4
rounds.summary: Work 10 single crochets in each row for 3 rows.

rounds.title: Row 5
rounds.summary: Work four increases followed by six single crochets.

rounds.title: Row 6
rounds.summary: Repeat one single crochet then one increase seven times.

rounds.title: Rows 7-11
rounds.summary: Work 21 single crochets in each row for 5 rows.

rounds.title: Row 12
rounds.summary: Work two decreases followed by ten single crochets.

rounds.title: Row 13
rounds.summary: Work 12 single crochets.

rounds.title: Stuff (it will only be in my head)
rounds.rawInstruction: Stuff (it will only be in my head)
rounds.summary: Add stuffing to the head section.

rounds.title: Row 13
rounds.summary: Work one decrease followed by ten single crochets.

rounds.title: Rows 14-83
rounds.summary: Work 11 single crochets in each row for 70 rows.

rounds.title: Row 84
rounds.summary: Work one decrease followed by nine single crochets.

rounds.title: Row 85
rounds.summary: Work 10 single crochets.

rounds.title: Row 86
rounds.summary: Work one decrease followed by eight single crochets.

rounds.title: Row 87
rounds.summary: Work 9 single crochets.

rounds.title: Row 88
rounds.summary: Work one decrease followed by seven single crochets.

rounds.title: Insert wire into body
rounds.rawInstruction: Next, insert the wire into the body, pre-bend the edges of the wire
rounds.summary: Insert the wire into the body, pre-bending the edges.

rounds.title: Row 89
rounds.summary: Work one decrease followed by six single crochets.

rounds.title: Row 90
rounds.summary: Work one decrease followed by five single crochets.

rounds.title: Rows 91-92
rounds.summary: Work 6 single crochets in each row for 2 rows.

rounds.title: Close 6 loops
rounds.summary: Close the remaining 6 loops to finish off.

rounds.title: Glue eyes and embroider eyebrows
rounds.rawInstruction: We glue the eyes and embroider the eyebrows.
rounds.summary: Attach eyes with glue and embroider eyebrows.

rounds.title: Row 1
rounds.rawInstruction: Start 10 sc in a magic ring
rounds.summary: Begin with 10 single crochets in a magic ring.

rounds.title: Row 2
rounds.summary: Work an increase six times.

rounds.title: Row 3
rounds.summary: Work 12 single crochets.

rounds.title: Row 4
rounds.summary: Repeat five single crochets then one increase two times.

rounds.title: Rows 5-6
rounds.summary: Work 14 single crochets in each row for 2 rows.

rounds.title: Row 7
rounds.rawInstruction: inc, 5 sc, 3 inc, 3 sc, 2 inc = 20 sc
rounds.summary: Work increase, five sc, three increases, three sc, two increases.

rounds.title: Row 8
rounds.summary: Work three increases, five sc, three increases, nine sc.

rounds.title: Rows 9-15
rounds.summary: Work 26 single crochets in each row for 7 rows.

rounds.title: Row 16
rounds.summary: Work two decreases, ten sc, two decreases, eight sc.

rounds.title: Stuff
rounds.summary: Add stuffing to the head.

rounds.title: Row 17
rounds.summary: Repeat four sc then decrease three times, then four sc.

rounds.title: Row 18
rounds.summary: Repeat two sc then decrease four times, then three sc.

rounds.title: Stuff
rounds.summary: Add more stuffing.

rounds.title: Rows 19-92
rounds.summary: Work 15 single crochets per round for 74 rows, gradually stuffing the body as you go.

rounds.title: Row 93
rounds.summary: Work one decrease followed by thirteen single crochets.

rounds.title: Row 94
rounds.summary: Work one decrease followed by twelve single crochets.

rounds.title: Row 95
rounds.summary: Work 13 single crochets.

rounds.title: Row 96
rounds.summary: Work one decrease followed by eleven single crochets.

rounds.title: Row 97
rounds.summary: Work one decrease followed by ten single crochets.

rounds.title: Row 98
rounds.summary: Work 11 single crochets.

rounds.title: Row 99
rounds.summary: Work one decrease followed by nine single crochets.

rounds.title: Row 100
rounds.summary: Work one decrease followed by eight single crochets.

rounds.title: Row 101
rounds.summary: Repeat one sc then decrease three times.

rounds.title: Row 102
rounds.summary: Work 6 single crochets.

rounds.title: Close 6 loops
rounds.summary: Close the remaining 6 loops to finish off.

rounds.title: Glue eyes and embroider eyebrows
rounds.rawInstruction: Gluing the eyes: I smeared the tips of the eyes with glue and inserted them in 10 rows from the beginning of the head, the distance between the eyes is 10 loops. We embroider eyebrows over the eyes.
rounds.summary: Glue eyes 10 rows from the head start with 10 loops between them, and embroider eyebrows.

materials: YarnArt JEANS (55% cotton, 45% Polyacrylic) Color No.:29
YarnArt Dolce Baby (100% Micro Polyester) Color No.: 80361
